goal: Guide the Agent to semantically translate legacy EKP/JSP form scripts into restricted NewOA/MK DSL script patches. Deterministic code extracts evidence only; the Agent decides whether a patch is safe.
principles: Translate behavior, not source syntax. Legacy function names and regex-like shapes are evidence, not completion criteria.
Use form/source/dsl context, targetApi capabilities, function catalog semantics, row markers, and native formRules evidence together.
Prefer verified native formRules or static form-property coverage when it fully covers behavior; otherwise generate small MKXFORM JavaScript using targetApi.
Never replace editShow/viewShow gated behavior with ungated native formRules; preserve the source-derived runWhen and translate the complete gated action body.

Whole-row or whole detail-table container visibility/required state prefers native formRules.linkage against layout sourceMarkers (including markers whose only child is a detail table). Use MKXFORM.setFieldAttr(<sourceMarker>, 4|5|3|6) only for residual scripted cases that native rules cannot cover.

A literal row marker absent from the current layout is an auditable orphan no-op only when Source Draft warning source.sysform.script_row_marker_orphan_noop proves it is used only as a common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset target, every reset argument is false, and no dynamic DOM creation exists. Never invent an MKXFORM.setFieldAttr target for it; preserve the warning.
${table:<detailTableId>}.<controlId> placeholders are only for detail-column APIs such as updateControl, updateControlStyle, and setDetailFieldItemAttr.
Keep unsupported, ambiguous, side-effect-heavy, or DOM-dependent behavior as needs_review/manual diagnostics.
Never emit DOM APIs in mapped output.

legacyApis.name: AttachXFormValueChangeEventById
legacyApis.semantic: Registers behavior that runs when a control value changes.
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Use the existing DSL action whose event is onChange and whose controlId/tableId matches the registered control. Do not create a new action.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The callback body can be expressed by native formRules or targetApi JavaScript inside that action.

legacyApis.name: Com_AddEventListener(window, "load", fn)
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Use the existing onLoad DSL action. Translate only initialization behavior that is fully represented in the source window and targetApi.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The source window contains a complete callback body and no unresolved residual behavior remains.

legacyApis.name: GetXFormFieldValueById
legacyApis.semantic: Reads a legacy form field value. Many legacy snippets read the first array item with [0].
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Use MKXFORM.getValue(fieldId). Normalize array or scalar values before comparisons.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The field id resolves in the DSL form or is explicitly preserved as source evidence for review.

legacyApis.name: GetXFormFieldById(...)[0].value
legacyApis.semantic: Reads or writes a legacy field through its DOM-like wrapper, including metadata-backed hidden helper state.
legacyApis.translationGuidance: When the field id resolves to a visible or dataOnly DSL field, translate reads to MKXFORM.getValue(fieldId) and assignments to MKXFORM.setValue(fieldId, value). Do not preserve the wrapper or direct .value access.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The field id resolves in form.fields, the value expression is understood, and no unrelated DOM mutation remains. dataOnly fields are valid value targets but cannot host control events.

legacyApis.name: SetXFormFieldValueById
legacyApis.semantic: Writes a legacy form field value.
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Use MKXFORM.setValue(fieldId, value) when the target field resolves and the value expression is safe.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The target resolves to a visible or dataOnly DSL field and no unrelated DOM mutation is required.

legacyApis.name: common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset
legacyApis.semantic: Controls row or field visibility and required state; arguments usually mean rowId, visible, required, reset.
legacyApis.translationGuidance: If native formRules already cover the same row behavior, patch the action to omitted with coverage.status covered. If JavaScript must cover it, use MKXFORM.setFieldAttr(<sourceMarker>, 5/4 for show/hide and 3/6 for required/not-required). The first argument must be the layout sourceMarker (for example aqxy_row or fd_jsx_row), never ${table:<detailTableId>} and never the detail-table field id even when the marked row only contains a detail table. When source.sysform.script_row_marker_orphan_noop carries the complete proof contract, omit that orphan call as an auditable no-op; do not emit setFieldAttr for the missing marker, translate every resolved marker and remaining helper effect, and preserve the warning.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The referenced row marker is present in layout sourceMarkers or otherwise resolves through form/layout evidence; or the marker has the complete Source Draft orphan proof (absentFromLayout, onlyHelperTarget, resetAlwaysFalse, and no dynamic DOM creation). No unresolved behavior may remain.

legacyApis.name: document.getElementById / getElementsByName / getElementsByTagName
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Do not emit DOM calls. Infer the business intent only if the surrounding code clearly maps to targetApi or native formRules.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The DOM usage is only incidental to value/visibility/required behavior that can be expressed by MKXFORM APIs.

legacyApis.name: legacy table validation helpers
legacyApis.semantic: Template-local helper functions such as setXxxTableValidate/setXxxTableNoValidate often toggle required validation for a group of controls or a layout row when a business category is selected.
legacyApis.translationGuidance: Do not translate helper names by string shape. Inspect the action-local call site, row markers, formRules, and detail-table fields. If native formRules already express the same visible/required effects, the helper may be coverage evidence; otherwise keep residual diagnostics or generate targetApi only when the full helper behavior is visible and safe.
legacyApis.safeWhen: The helper's only business effect is visible/required state that is represented by native formRules or MKXFORM.setFieldAttr/setDetailFieldAttr, and row add/delete DOM hooks are not required for data correctness.

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.getValue
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Normalize array/object/scalar values before comparing when legacy code used [0].

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.setValue
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Use only for resolved target fields and safe value expressions.

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.setFieldAttr
targetApiCapabilities.semantic: Set a main-field or row marker attribute: 3 required, 4 hide, 5 show, 6 not required.
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Good fit for legacy row visibility/required behavior when row markers are present. Do not pass ${table:<detailTableId>} or a detail-table field id; those targets are invalid for setFieldAttr.

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.setDetailFieldAttr
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Use for detail table field attributes when the target id is table.field or otherwise evidenced.

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.updateControl
targetApiCapabilities.semantic: Update a control value, including a row-scoped detail control when called with a table.field placeholder and rowNum.
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Good fit for same-row hidden helper fields that carry business state.

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.setDetailFieldItemAttr
targetApiCapabilities.semantic: Set a single detail-row field item's attribute, such as required or not-required.
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Use with rowNum when the legacy source toggles validate=required for one row's detail field.

targetApiCapabilities.name: MKXFORM.updateControlStyle
targetApiCapabilities.notes: Use for row-scoped detail visibility when the action has rowNum and a resolved detail control target.

allowedPatterns.description: If dslDraft.formRules.linkage with matching meta.sourceJsp fully covers the action behavior, patch function to empty string, translationStatus to omitted, functionMappings to native formRules evidence, and coverage.status to covered with residuals empty.

If the draft script action already carries coverage.status=covered, non-empty coverage.nativeRules, and empty coverage.residuals, treat that as scoped native coverage evidence from deterministic fact extraction. Close the action as omitted/covered; do not re-open it because the same JSP file contains DOM helpers, validation helper definitions, or other callbacks.

If an ungated action only assigns a form property already present in the DSL, preserve coverage.staticProps as exact fieldId/prop/value evidence, use no nativeRules, and close the action as omitted with an empty function and no residuals.

If targetApi JavaScript covers all source behavior, patch function, translationStatus mapped, functionMappings with semantic-translation/function-catalog/native-rule basis, and coverage.status translated with residuals empty.

When Source Draft warning source.sysform.script_row_marker_orphan_noop has the complete proof contract for an action sourceRef, list that missing literal marker as an orphan no-op and emit no MKXFORM.setFieldAttr call for it. Translate all resolved markers and remaining helper behavior; coverage may be translated only with no unresolved marker or residual, and the warning must remain in the audit record.
If only part of the behavior is safe, do not patch to mapped. Leave needs_review/manual and emit diagnostics naming safe pieces and unresolved residuals.

Evaluate coverage against the action-local source excerpt first. Other helper definitions or other callbacks in the same JSP file are background evidence only; they become residuals for the current action only when the action-local source invokes them and their behavior is not covered by native formRules or targetApi JavaScript.

forbiddenPatterns: new actions, deleted actions, changed action scope/controlId/tableId/event
coverage translated/covered when residual behavior remains
MKXFORM.setFieldAttr for an orphan, unresolved, or otherwise missing layout marker
unknown or blocked MKXFORM target APIs

coverageStandards.translated: Generated MK JavaScript covers all executable source behavior for this action; warning-proven orphan row calls may be audited no-ops, unresolved markers are forbidden, and residuals must be empty.
coverageStandards.covered: Verified native formRules or static form properties cover all source behavior; function must be empty and residuals must be empty.
coverageStandards.partial: Native rules cover some behavior but residual JSP behavior remains.
coverageStandards.none: No source behavior was identified for coverage accounting.

fewShotExamples.sourceBehavior: onLoad callback only calls common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("fd_jsx_row", false, false, false).

onLoad toggles persisted invoice_row10 and missing invoice_row11; Source Draft warning source.sysform.script_row_marker_orphan_noop proves invoice_row11 is only a literal common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset target, reset is always false, it is absent from layout, and no dynamic DOM creation exists.
fewShotExamples.auditGuidance: List invoice_row10 as resolved and invoice_row11 as orphan. Do not call setFieldAttr for invoice_row11, and retain the Source Draft warning in review.warnings.

fewShotExamples.sourceBehavior: onLoad reads GetXFormFieldValueById("fd_cglx1")[0] and shows/requires fd_jsx_row only when the value equals D.
Value-change callback toggles row visibility/required state, and the draft action already has coverage.status covered with nativeRules and no residuals.
fewShotExamples.residualGuidance: Do not keep this action needs_review only because the same JSP source file or helper library contains DOM traversal or table validation helpers. The action's existing covered/no-residual coverage fact is the closure signal.

fewShotExamples.sourceBehavior: A detail-table onChange callback receives the changed purchase type and shows a same-row replacement-asset field only when the value is gh; the source also writes a same-row hidden helper value and toggles validate=required.

strongerPatchShapeWhenHiddenAndRequiredA.function:
function onChange(value, rowNum, parentRowNum) {
  var selectedValue = Array.isArray(value) ? value[0] : value
  var isReplacement = selectedValue === 'gh'
  var targetField = '${table:fd_detail}.fd_replacement_asset'
  var hiddenField = '${table:fd_detail}.fd_isout_val'
  MKXFORM.updateControl(hiddenField, rowNum, isReplacement ? 'true' : '')
  MKXFORM.updateControlStyle(targetField, rowNum, { display: isReplacement ? 'block' : 'none' })
  MKXFORM.setDetailFieldItemAttr(targetField, rowNum, isReplacement ? 3 : 6)
}

fewShotExamples.eventBindingGuidance: If the DSL action already has event=onChange and matching tableId/controlId, legacy onclick/setAttribute/__xformDispatch code is event-binding scaffolding, not business residual.

fewShotExamples.sourceBehavior: onLoad initializes visible/required row states but also walks inputs/images, rewrites add/delete onclick handlers, and calls validation helpers whose full effects are not visible or covered.
fewShotExamples.safeOutcome: Do not patch the entire action to mapped. Either emit diagnostics or patch only if the action-local source plus formRules prove those DOM lifecycle effects are redundant and all business-visible behavior is covered.

fewShotExamples.sourceBehavior: Source walks all img/span/input elements to bind clicks or patch temporary-save display quirks.
fewShotExamples.safeOutcome: Do not patch to mapped. Leave needs_review/manual and emit diagnostics explaining unsupported DOM lifecycle behavior.
